title: pilosella niphostribes subsp. lasiocephala
intro: Pilosella niphostribes subsp. lasiocephala, also known as a type of flowering plant within the dandelion family, is a rare and lesser-known species. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pilosella niphostribes subsp. lasiocephala can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
